titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of DCA DCD Misc. Ch. 5967

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=762 status=reviewed modified=2022-10-31 21:10:50.627161+00 | translation moa=763 status=reviewed modified=2022-10-31 21:10:50.635281+00

div.p:
Omnibus Christi fidelibus hoc scriptum visuris uel Audituris  laurencius filius Willelmi filius Gocelini de Berewic salutem .
Nouerit vniuersitas uestra me dedisse . Concessisse . et hac presenti carta mea Confirmasse Domino Ricardo Priori et Conuentui
de Coldingh’ et eorum successoribus Inperpetuum vnam Bouatam terre Interritorio de Prendergest’ de terra defensabili . illam silicet
Bouatam terre uersus orientem  quam aldanus filius Waldeui tenuit . et Quindecim acras terre que erant quondam de domin
ico Iohannis de Neuilla . silicet ad thornedales sex acras terre . ad Backestanesrig  duas acras terre et dimidiam . ad Crumbedales
tres acras terre et dimidiam . ad schortelandes  vnam acram terre et dimidiam . ad lillesaccre  vnam accram . et ad crumbedales
vnam dimidiam accram terre . quas habui de dono Roberti fratris mei pro quadam suma pecunie quam dictus Prior mihi In ma
gna necessitate permanibus pacauit . Habendas et Tenendas dictis priori et Conuentui de coldingh’ et eorum successoribus libere .
et quiete In omnibus  sicud plenius et melius Continetur In carta quam dictus Robertus frater meus habuit ex collacione
Iohannis de Neuill’ congnati nostri de Eodem tenemento confecta . Ego uero et heredes mei dictam donacionem et concessionem dictis
priori et Conuentui et eorum successoribus Inperpetuum Warantizabimus . adquietabimus . et defendemus contra omnes homines et fem
inas . In Cuius Rei Testimonium  presenti scripto sigillum meum apposui . Testibus . Domino Willelmo de Mordingtona . Domino dauid de
Haddingtona . Domino Radulfo nobili . Domino Willelmo de scremerstona . Ada de prendergest’ . Ada filio Iohannis de superyoryeytona . Thoma de Nesb
yt . Bertramo de Riston . Patricio scotto . Gilberto de Lumesden . Iohanne filio Ingerami . Gregorio de Betyoc . et ALIIS .

p.cl: To all Christ's faithful who shall view or hear this written document, Laurence, son of William son of Gocelin of Berwick, sends greeting.

Know me, all of you, to have given, granted, and by this my present charter to have made firm, to the lord prior, Richard, and the convent of Coldingham and their successors for ever, one oxgang of land in the territory of Prenderguest from the fortified land; namely that oxgang towards the east which Haldan son of Waldef held; and fifteen acres of land that were once in the demesne of John of Neville, that is, six acres of land at Thornedales, two and a half acres of land at Backestanesrig, three and a half acres at Crumbedales, one and a half acres at Schortelandes, one acre at Lillesacre, and a half-acre at Crumbedales, which I had from the gift of Robert my brother in return for a certain sum of money which the said Prior paid me in great necessity; for the said prior and convent of Coldingham and their successors to have and to hold freely and quitely in all things, just as it is the more fully and better contained in the charter which the said Robert my brother had from the conferment of John of Neville, our cousin, drawn up in respect of the same holding. And I and my heirs shall warrant, acquit, and defend the said donation and grant to the said prior and convent and their successors for ever against all men and women.
As witness of this matter I have applied my seal to the present document.

As witnesses, the lord William of Mordington, the lord David of Haddington, the lord Ralph Noble, the lord William of Scremerston, Adam of Prenderguest, Adam son of John of Over Ayton, Thomas of Nisbet, Bertram of Reston, Patrick Scott, Gilbert of Lumsdaine, John son of Ingram, Gregory of Bethock, and others.
